args.content:
# Hawaii Packing List

Based on the vacation plans for Hawaii (June 10-20, 2024):

## Clothing
- Swimwear (for Waikiki Beach, Hanauma Bay, Kailua Beach)
- Casual outfits (for daily activities and shopping at Ala Moana Center)
- Light jacket or sweater (for cooler evenings)
- Hiking gear (for Diamond Head hike)
- Beach sandals and comfortable walking shoes

## Activities & Equipment
- Snorkeling gear (for Hanauma Bay)
- Camera (to capture memories)
- Kayaking equipment (for Kailua Beach)

## Essentials
- Sunscreen (essential for all outdoor activities)
- Sunglasses and hat
- Travel documents (ID, passport, flight tickets, hotel reservations)
- Reusable water bottle
- Beach towel

## Personal Items
- Toiletries
- Medications
- Phone and charger
- Travel adapter (if needed)

## Special Items
- Traditional attire (for Luau experience at Polynesian Cultural Center)
- Shopping bag (for purchases at Ala Moana Center)

## Notes
- Check weather forecast before departure
- Confirm reservations for activities
- Pack environmentally friendly reef-safe sunscreen
